figures.title: V5 01 Outcome Overview
figures.caption: Variant outcomes, advantage distribution, baseline NRMSE, and best-QRC composition.

figures.title: V5 02 Regime Map
figures.caption: Validation regime map with all rows, family rates, and best-variant composition.

figures.title: V5 03 Family Effects
figures.caption: Validation family useful rates and mean-advantage confidence intervals.

figures.title: V5 04 Feature Regressions
figures.caption: All validation datapoints plotted against top features with regression lines and confidence bands.

figures.title: V5 05 Meta Model Validation
figures.caption: Discovery-trained meta-model prediction, calibration, residuals, and feature importances.

figures.title: V5 06 Robustness
figures.caption: Feature-set robustness, threshold robustness, and split stability.

figures.title: V5 07 Family Feature Matrix
figures.caption: Family-level feature heatmap with useful rates and effect intervals.

claim_boundary: The v5 publication package supports a protocol-local regime-atlas claim for globally frozen canonical QRC variants against a globally frozen feature-matched ESN. It does not establish broad average QRC superiority, quantum advantage, or an entanglement/coupling mechanism.
